author: y4rr
content: Observation: FCOS forward worked first-try, with no probe-stage debugging needed. All 5 verify images PASS with max_abs ~ 1.5e-4 and n_det_ratio = 1.0. The architectural correctness review (cross-checking torchvision fcos.py + _utils.BoxLinearCoder + AnchorGenerator) caught the spec drift in the task description (regression activation is ReLU not exp; NO per-level learned scales — torchvision DOES have a scales parameter list in OTHER FCOS variants but not in fcos_resnet50_fpn) before any code was written. State_dict inspection confirmed 0 scale keys, 319 total keys, 32,269,600 upstream params.
